headlines.title: Massive leadership vacuum weakens U.S. diplomacy in the face of global crises
headlines.description: Hundreds of diplomats have been forced to retire or were laid off in the Trump administration

headlines.title: Andy Beshear says ‘Texas is in play’ for Democrats after Paxton nomination: Full interview
headlines.description: In an exclusive interview with Meet the Press, Gov. Andy Beshear (D-Ky.) expresses his support for State Sen. James Talarico (D-Texas) who will face off with Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton for the Senate in November.

headlines.title: Graham Platner’s wife ‘angry’ her disclosures of his extramarital sexting were made public
headlines.description: The wife of Graham Platner, the presumptive Democratic nominee for the Senate in Maine, said she is “really angry” about reports that she previously told her husband’s campaign he had exchanged sexually explicit texts with other women.“It makes me really angry, disappointed,” Platner’s wife, Amy Gertner, said in a direct-to-camera video Platner’s campaign released Saturday night.

headlines.title: Mike Pence says the Trump administration has ‘departed’ from conservative principles
headlines.description: Former Vice President Mike Pence said the second administration of President Donald Trump has “departed” from traditional conservative principles in the president’s second term.

headlines.title: Breakthrough pancreatic cancer treatment could double survival time
headlines.description: A new study on a groundbreaking pancreatic cancer drug finds that it has the potential to double survival rates for more than 90 percent of patients. Researchers are now exploring whether the drug, called daraxonrasib, could also be effective in lung, ovarian, and colorectal cancers. NBC News’ Erika Edwards reports.

headlines.title: Colombia’s Petro sows doubt about election as favored successor heads to runoff against pro-Trump rival
headlines.description: Colombia’s outgoing president sowed doubt Sunday about his country’s elections, which showed his preferred candidate, Iván Cepeda, headed to a runoff next month against right-wing opponent Abelardo de la Espriella

headlines.title: Body of ‘Alaskan Bush People’ star Matt Brown found in Washington state river
headlines.description: A body pulled from a Washington state river has been identified as that of “Alaskan Bush People” cast member Matt Brown

headlines.title: Extended Interview: Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio
headlines.description: On the sidelines of the Trump-Xi Summit in Beijing, NBC News' Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio to discuss China policy, the war with Iran, the future of Cuba, and more.

headlines.title: U.S. says it struck Iranian drone and radar sites, as Iran claims attack on air base
headlines.description: The U.S. military said it carried out what it called self-defense strikes on Iranian radar and drone control sites over the weekend, while Iran said it targeted an air base used in the U.S. attack as the two countries continued to trade strikes amid talks to end their war.U.S.

headlines.title: Body of ‘Alaskan Bush People’ star Matt Brown found in Washington state river
headlines.description: A body pulled from a Washington state river has been identified as that of “Alaskan Bush People” cast member Matt Brown

headlines.title: Colombia’s Petro sows doubt about election as favored successor heads to runoff against pro-Trump rival
headlines.description: Colombia’s outgoing president sowed doubt Sunday about his country’s elections, which showed his preferred candidate, Iván Cepeda, headed to a runoff next month against right-wing opponent Abelardo de la Espriella

headlines.title: Remains found in New Mexico national forest ID’d as woman who vanished last year
headlines.description: Human remains found by a hiker last week in a New Mexico national forest are those of a Los Alamos National Laboratory employee who had been missing for nearly a year, authorities said
